meaning: adj.未深思的 考虑不周的 轻率的,粗心的
examples: A creative person is neither a utopianist nor a unthoughtful daredevil.
A creative person is neither a utopian ist nor a unthoughtful daredevil.
A creative person is neither a utopia nist nor a unthoughtful daredevil.
Yes, that means that it gives voice to a lot of unthoughtful people who would have previously been edited out of having a voice.
